title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 316 至 570 行，共 570 行) ---
 316 |     def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 317 |         """简单分词（支持中英文）"""
 318 |         import re
 319 | 
 320 |         # 英文/路径片段：保留下划线文件名（如 memory_layers），同时拆分为普通英文词
 321 |         raw_words = re.findall(r'\b[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,}\b', text.lower())
 322 |         words = []
 323 |         for word in raw_words:
 324 |             words.append(word)
 325 |             words.extend(part for part in word.split('_') if len(part) >= 2)
 326 | 
 327 |         # 中文分词（简单实现：提取 2-3 字的片段）
 328 |         # 注意：这是简化版本，实际应用中应使用 jieba 等分词工具
 329 |         chinese_2char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2}', text)
 330 |         chinese_3char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{3}', text)
 331 | 
 332 |         # 合并并去重
 333 |         chinese = list(set(chinese_2char + chinese_3char))
 334 | 
 335 |         return words + chinese
 336 | 
 337 |     def store(self, summary: SessionSummary) -> str:
 338 |         """
 339 |         存储摘要到长期记忆
 340 | 
 341 |         Args:
 342 |             summary: 会话摘要
 343 | 
 344 |         Returns:
 345 |             存储的文件路径
 346 |         """
 347 |         # 生成文件名
 348 |         timestamp = summary.timestamp.replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
 349 |         filename = f"summary_{summary.session_id}_{timestamp}.json"
 350 |         file_path = self.storage_dir / filename
 351 | 
 352 |         # 保存到磁盘
 353 |         try:
 354 |             with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 355 |                 json.dump(summary.to_dict(), f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 356 | 
 357 |             # 更新索引
 358 |             self.index[summary.session_id] = file_path
 359 | 
 360 |             # 更新倒排索引
 361 |             keywords = self._extract_keywords(summary.to_dict())
 362 |             for keyword in keywords:
 363 |                 if keyword not in self.inverted_index:
 364 |                     self.inverted_index[keyword] = []
 365 |                 if summary.session_id not in self.inverted_index[keyword]:
 366 |                     self.inverted_index[keyword].append(summary.session_id)
 367 | 
 368 |             # 保存索引
 369 |             self._save_index()
 370 | 
 371 |             return str(file_path)
 372 |         except Exception as e:
 373 |             print(f"⚠️ 存储摘要失败: {e}")
 374 |             return ""
 375 | 
 376 |     def store_item(self, item: MemoryItem) -> str:
 377 |         """
 378 |         存储 MemoryItem 到长期记忆。
 379 | 
 380 |         Args:
 381 |             item: 长期知识条目
 382 | 
 383 |         Returns:
 384 |             存储的文件路径
 385 |         """
 386 |         timestamp = item.updated_at.replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
 387 |         filename = f"memory_item_{item.id}_{timestamp}.json"
 388 |         file_path = self.storage_dir / filename
 389 | 
 390 |         try:
 391 |             with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 392 |                 json.dump(item.to_dict(), f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 393 | 
 394 |             old_file = self.item_index.get(item.id)
 395 |             if old_file and old_file != file_path and old_file.exists():
 396 |                 old_file.unlink()
 397 | 
 398 |             self.item_index[item.id] = file_path
 399 |             self._remove_id_from_inverted_index(self.item_inverted_index, item.id)
 400 | 
 401 |             keywords = self._extract_item_keywords(item.to_dict())
 402 |             for keyword in keywords:
 403 |                 if keyword not in self.item_inverted_index:
 404 |                     self.item_inverted_index[keyword] = []
 405 |                 if item.id not in self.item_inverted_index[keyword]:
 406 |                     self.item_inverted_index[keyword].append(item.id)
 407 | 
 408 |             self._save_index()
 409 |             return str(file_path)
 410 |         except Exception as e:
 411 |             print(f"⚠️ 存储 MemoryItem 失败: {e}")
 412 |             return ""
 413 | 
 414 |     def retrieve_item(self, i...
